title: Tasty Ukrainian Prawns Stew
description: A winey, bouncy Ukrainian stew that brings prawns to life with fresh vegetables and aromatic dill, cooked in a traditional ttukbaegi earthenware pot.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, diced carrot, and bell pepper, cooking for another 3 minutes until vegetables soften.
Mix in tomato paste and cook for 1 minute to release flavor.
Pour in white wine, deglaze the pot, scraping up any browned bits, and let reduce for 2 minutes.
Add vegetable broth, bring to a simmer, and season with salt and pepper.
Gently fold in the prawns, cover, and simmer until prawns turn pink and opaque, about 4 minutes.
Finish with chopped dill just before serving and adjust seasoning if needed.
